zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Saint Loe於1515年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾金斯頓時，他的父親Sir John Saint Lowe16歲，母親Margaret Kingston22歲。他於大約1540年與Margaret Hughes在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1578年在英國維爾爾布洛阿德 哈爾可享年63歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾布洛阿德 哈爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Saint Loe于1515年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾金斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John Saint Lowe16岁，母亲Margaret Kingston22岁。他于大约1540年与Margaret Hughes在英国英格兰波克夏金斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1578年在英国維爾爾布洛阿德 哈爾可享年63岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾布洛阿德 哈爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Loe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Lo, most of them from Old Norse ló ‘meadow by water’ e.g. a river.
Dutch and North German (Westphalia): variant of   Loo  .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 呂 (mainly found in Indonesia), see   Lu   6.

variants.name: Loo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Sing, Ying, Wing, Ming, Siu, Boon, Bor, Chih-Chung, Chuan, Chun, Dong, Eng.

North German and Dutch: topographic name for someone living near a wood (Dutch loo ‘wood’, Middle Low German lo, loge), or a habitational name from any of the places called Lo or Loh, named with this word.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 盧, 蘆, 魯, 路, 陸 and 呂. See   Lu   1-6.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Saint Loe was born in 1515, in Kingston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Saint Lowe, was 16 and his mother, Margaret Kingston, was 22. He married Margaret Hughes about 1540, in Kingston, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1578, in Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Saint Loe est né en 1515, à Kingston, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Saint Lowe, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Kingston, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hughes environ 1540, à Kingston, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1578, à Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Saint Loe 1515 in Kingston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Saint Lowe 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Kingston 22. Er hat um 1540 in Kingston, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1578 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Hughes circa 1540, nel Kingston, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Edward Saint Loeが1515年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアキングストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Saint Loweは16歳，母Margaret Kingstonは22歳であった。約1540年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキングストンでMargaret Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1578年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブロアド チャルクで63歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアブロアド チャルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Saint Loe(이)가 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Saint Lowe(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Kingston(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴에서 Margaret Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 영국 윌츠히르 브로드 차크에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 브로드 차크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Saint Loe nasceu em 1515, em Kingston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Saint Lowe, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Kingston, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hughes aproximadamente 1540, em Kingston, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1578, em Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Saint Loe родился в 1515 г. в местности кингстон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Saint Lowe было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Kingston, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hughes около 1540 г. в местности кингстон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1578 г. в местности броад халк, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности броад халк, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Hughes aproximadamente 1540, en Kingston, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1578, en Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Broad Chalke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
